name: design-agent
description: Design Agent for Callour Studio. Connects Codex to the Superhuman Operations MCP and runs the task workflow (start-task, post-comment) plus senior UX design production (information-architecture, wireframe).

interface.shortDescription: Senior UX design workflow on Superhuman tasks.
interface.longDescription: A Design Agent for Callour Studio. Connects to the Superhuman Operations MCP and adds skills to run a task (start-task, post-comment) and produce senior-grade UX deliverables (information-architecture, wireframe). Acts as a Senior Principal UX Designer. Operational surface only — no finance, sales, or people money. Requires a SUPERHUMAN_MCP_TOKEN env var (ask the founder for a token).
defaultPrompt: Start task <paste a task link> and walk me through it.
Build the information architecture for this task.
Wireframe the key screens for this task.
